message:
Running command: 
echo "=== COMPREHENSIVE STATUS $(date) ==="

# Check LibreLane
LIBPID=$(ps aux | grep librelane | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "LibreLane PID: $LIBPID"
[ -n "$LIBPID" ] && cat /proc/$LIBPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|VmRSS|Threads)"

# Check new openroad
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "OpenROAD PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/$ORPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|VmRSS|Threads)"

# Check all processes
echo "=== All relevant processes ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|magic|netgen|klayout)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}' | head -10

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo ""
echo "=== Run dirs ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -8

echo ""
echo "=== Step 71 contents ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | head -5
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/" 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== Step 71 state_out? ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "state_out EXISTS!" || echo "No state_out"

echo ""
echo "=== Final? ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL!" || echo "No final"

echo ""
echo "=== flow.log tail ==="
tail -20 "$RUN_DIR/flow.log" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== error.log tail ==="
tail -10 "$RUN_DIR/error.log" 2>/dev/null

function.arguments:
{"command": "
echo "=== COMPREHENSIVE STATUS $(date) ==="

# Check LibreLane
LIBPID=$(ps aux | grep librelane | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "LibreLane PID: $LIBPID"

# Check new openroad
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "OpenROAD PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/$ORPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|VmRSS|Threads)"

# Check all processes
echo "=== All relevant processes ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|magic|netgen|klayout)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}' | head -10

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Run dirs ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -8

echo ""
echo "=== Step 71 contents ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | head -5
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/" 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== Step 71 state_out? ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "state_out EXISTS!" || echo "No state_out"

echo ""

tail -10 "$RUN_DIR/error.log" 2>/dev/null
", "timeout": 20}
function.name: execute_bash
